title: Flaky Italian Rice Flour Pancakes
description: Rich and flaky rice flour pancakes with a touch of Italian spices for a delightful brunch dish that's gluten-free-friendly.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix rice flour, baking powder, and salt. Add butter and milk, stirring until a smooth batter forms.
Whisk in eggs and tomato paste; ensure the mixture is well combined without any lumps.

Heat olive oil lightly on a skillet over medium heat. Pour about 1/4 cup of batter per pancake into hot skillet for each pancake. Cook for about 2-3 minutes until golden brown, flip and cook another minute.
Place cooked pancakes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or a silicone mat in an oven-proof dish to bake together at 350°F (175°C) for 10-12 minutes or until they're fully baked.
